programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a skittish Savannah cat with an unusual condition. And, the team races to save a stray dog as it runs toward the freeway.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: An arborist pushes the team's skills to the limit, requesting a tri-level residence a dizzying 60-feet up in three giant redwood trees. Will they deliver.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto pays for his hernia surgery and ends up with gold fever. Meanwhile, Atz conquers old fears and reaches new heights as he races the freeze to complete his cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: Surviving the Last Frontier

programme.title: Gator Boys

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads to a life and death battle for a litter of pups and an emaciated mare struggles to give birth to her foal.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston

programme.title: My Cat From Hell

programme.title: Lone Star Law

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: When a puppy is found abandoned with a broken leg, Dr. Jeff is his only hope to walk again. Plus, the team cares for a Boston Terrier who shows signs of a serious illness.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: The Heart Of A Pit Bull. A young man's pet goat is injured in a freak accident. Can Dr. Jeff help? Plus, Gus, a dog, has swallowed a mysterious object and has been unwell since.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Nearly a year has passed since Earl's run-in with the law, and Earl and Toney join forces to rescue a dog from an abandoned home. Mariah must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell

programme.desc: Tia travels to Nashville with Tania and new parolee Randy to save a dog from death row; a storm threatens to flood Villalobos; a rescued puppy may find a permanent home.

programme.desc: Installing a whole house humidifier system; how to quickly paint shutters in bulk; creating a triangular top outdoor end table out of teak wood.
